features: SMOOTH AND NOURISHED SKIN: NIVEA Orange & Avocado Oil body cream shower gel offers touchably smooth, soft skin feel that lasts even after towel drying
SKIN PROTECTION FORMULA: This NIVEA body moisturiser shower cream is formulated with vitamin C, E, and precious oils; it pampers and protects skin from drying out
ORANGE SCENT: NIVEA moisturising cleansing lotion with delicate Orange fragrance indulges the senses and adds a dose of luxury to any shower and skincare routine
HOW TO APPLY: Simply squeeze a small amount of this shower skin moisturiser onto hands and lather, then massage into wet skin for deeply nourished skin
PLANET & SKIN LOVING: NIVEA offers dermatologically approved care. This bottle is 100% climate-neutral, microplastic-free, and made from 96% recycled plastic*
description: Product Description " NIVEA Orange & Avocado Oil Shower Cream - Indulge your senses in this soothing and moisturising shower gel Let the soft lather of this Orange and Avocado shower cream nourish your skin with every shower. Infused with vitamin C, E, and precious oils, this indulgent shower gel not only pampers your skin but also shields it from drying out. NIVEA's everyday body wash, enriched with avocado oil, leaves your skin feeling healthy and features a delicate orange scent to indulge your senses. Backed by 130 years of experience, our dedicated researchers continually develop high-quality, dermatologically approved products tailored to meet the diverse needs of all skin types. Application information: Simply massage onto wet skin and rinse off for a refreshing cleanse. Free from microplastics, pH skin-neutral balance, 99% biodegradable formula, and 100% climate-neutralised. Packaged in a bottle made from 96% recycled plastic.* *excluding cap & label Product benefits: Luxurious shower cream for touchably smooth, soft skin feel Formulated with vitamins C, E & precious oils to protect skin from drying out Delicate orange fragrance and avocado oil to indulge the senses pH Skin Balanced. Skin compatibility dermatologically approved Microplastic-free & 96% recycled plastic " Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Coco-Glucoside, Persea Gratissima Oil, Vitis Vinifera Seed Oil, Sodium Ascorbyl Phosphate, Tocopherol, Glycerin, Glycol Distearate, Citric Acid, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Sodium Chloride, Sodium Benzoate, Benzoic Acid, Limonene, Geraniol, Parfum Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes in such case rinse carfully with water Manufacturer Contact Information Beiersdorf UK Ltd. Trinity Central Trinity Park Bickenhill Lane Birmingham B37 7ES See more
